'''√sh-n-y''' ('''kashanay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lapidate|lapidate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lapidate|lapidate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-n-y
|-
! Lemma
| kashanay
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishanay || jishanay || shishanay || kishanay
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushanay || jujushanay || shushushanay || kukushanay
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushanay || jushanay || shushanay || kushanay
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushanay || jushanay || shushanay || kushanay
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshanay || jeshanay || sheshanay || keshanay
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshanay || jojoshanay || shoshoshanay || kokoshanay
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshanay || joshanay || shoshanay || koshanay
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshanay || joshanay || shoshanay || koshanay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shanay || shanay || shanay || shanay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shanay || shanay || shanay || shanay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shanay || shanay || shanay || shanay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shanay || shanay || shanay || shanay
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæshanay || jæshanay || shæshanay || kæshanay
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashanay || jajashanay || shashashanay || kakashanay
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashanay || jashanay || shashanay || kashanay
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashanay || jashanay || shashanay || kashanay
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shashanay
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshashanay
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishashanay
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shashanaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshashanaynknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishashanaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shashanayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshashanaynkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishashanayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shashanayro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshashanaynkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishashanayro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shashanaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshashanaynkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishashanaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shashanaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshashanaynksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishashanaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shashanayng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshashanaynkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishashanayng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shashanayya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshashanaynkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishashanayya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shashanayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshashanaynkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishashanayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shashanaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshashanaynknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishashanaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shashanaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashanaynknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashanaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shashanaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshashanaynknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashanaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shashanayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshashanaynkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishashanayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shashanayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashanaynkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashanayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shashanayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshashanaynkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashanayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shashanayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshashanaynkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishashanayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shashanayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshashanaynkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishashanayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shashanayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshashanaynkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashanayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shashanaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshashanaynkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishashanaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shashanaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshashanaynkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishashanaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shashanaymuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashanaynkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashanaymuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
